CustomField.description: If checked and the applicant can't afford the rent, the landlord may approve the applicant if family, friends or organizations will assist in paying the rent. Auto filled from the "Development Allows Rental Assistance?" field on the Development.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked and the applicant can't afford the rent, the landlord may approve the applicant if family, friends or organizations will assist in paying the rent. Auto filled from the "Development Allows Rental Assistance?" field on the Development.
CustomField.label: Rental Assistance Permitted
